div.h3: SQLite Aggregate State Machine Technical Specification

ol.li: Handle Validity: No state transition can occur without a valid sqlite3* handle pointer.
Concurrency: B_TREE_IO requires an acquired Pager lock (Shared/Reserved/Exclusive).
Integrity: TX_COMMIT must be reached via Op_Halt to ensure journal/WAL integrity.
Isolation: States 0x01 through 0x04 operate within a protected heap segment.

ul.li: Any non-OK result code in VM_EXECUTION forces an automatic ROLLBACK action.
Faults in B_TREE_IO (IOERR) trigger immediate transition to FAULT_RECOVERY.
Recovery from FAULT state requires a full sqlite3_reset() to clear the VM stack.
